title: Mansi Budamagunta
text:
I’m a data scientist with a research background. I specialize in using computational techniques to study problems across a variety of domains — including AI, policy, environment, and healthcare.
I’m currently completing an MSc in Applied Data Science at Utrecht University (graduating July 2026), where my thesis uses computational text analysis to investigate whether EU research funding actually reflects the Union’s own commitments to openness and technological sovereignty.
You can find more details on my CV.
